LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_Enclave_Advanced_Power_A: Craft an 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet using military-grade schematics.
Making 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet.
make 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet
Craft an 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet using military-grade schematics.
Making 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet.
make 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet
